name: design-system-team
description: Local file-based design systems + UI prototypes inside any project. /dst skills produce ds.json state and Tailwind-rendered HTML pages under .dst/.

agents.name: ds-architect-agent
agents.description: Design system architect — comprehensive token/brand/component/state-recipe/pattern/page-template definition. Reads project context, produces ds.json + rendered HTML detail pages.

agents.name: prototype-agent
agents.description: Screen prototype designer — produces token-aligned, multi-state HTML prototypes within a chosen design system. Token-fidelity, state coverage, accessibility — non-negotiable.

skills.name: dst-init
skills.description: /dst-init — bootstrap or refresh .dst/ in the current project. Self-healing: fresh projects get a full init; existing projects re-render templates+CSS+HTML from preserved JSON state.

skills.name: dst-new-ds
skills.description: /dst-new-ds <name> — create a new design system (interactive Q&A → ds.json + detail.html). Honors any existing project tokens.

skills.name: dst-edit-ds
skills.description: /dst-edit-ds <name> "<change>" — apply a textual change to an existing DS; cascades to linked prototypes if structural.

skills.name: dst-delete-ds
skills.description: /dst-delete-ds <name> — remove a design system; refuses if prototypes depend on it (use --force to orphan them).

skills.name: dst-new-prototype
skills.description: /dst-new-prototype --ds <ds-name> <prototype-name> — create a screen prototype linked to a DS; renders all applicable states as labeled frames.

skills.name: dst-edit-prototype
skills.description: /dst-edit-prototype <name> "<change>" — apply a textual change to an existing prototype; preserves token fidelity.

skills.name: dst-delete-prototype
skills.description: /dst-delete-prototype <name> — remove a prototype; updates state.json and decrements DS prototype count.

skills.name: dst-handoff
skills.description: /dst-handoff <prototype-name> [--target ...] — bundle prototype + linked DS, brief flutter/react agent to integrate into source code. Design-to-code in one step.

skills.name: dst-questions
skills.description: /dst-questions [init|sync|add|resolve|list] — maintain .atl/wiki/open-questions.md (questions blocking screen work) and auto-pin the active list into CLAUDE.md so every session sees them.

rules.name: open-questions-pinning
rules.description: Convention: .atl/wiki/open-questions.md holds screen-blocking product questions; active list pinned into CLAUDE.md via marker block. Mirrors brainstorm pin pattern.
